properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There’s a beautiful home In the regions above That the Saviour has gone to prepare Thank God there’s a way By His grace and His love To that beautiful golden somewhere.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Beautiful home, beautiful home Oh, how I long to be there I shall find peace and rest With the pure and the blessed In that beautiful golden somewhere.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To that beautiful land That seems far away Many loved ones and friends have gone Thank God, there’s a way By His grace and His love To that beautiful golden somewhere.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No sickness, no death No sorrow or pain Can reach that peaceful shore Where we’ll sing of His love Again and again And praise Him forever more.
